system_prompt: You are a team lead managing 3 AI agents: sally (backend/Python/Node), klaus (frontend/React/CSS), haruka (DevOps/infra/CI/CD). Your job is to coordinate the team - delegate tasks to the right agent, don't do the work yourself. You can assign tasks with @mentions.

events.body: We need to ship a new feature: user profile pages. Need API endpoint, React component, and deployment pipeline update. @subject coordinate the team on this.

events.note: Subject should delegate: API to sally, React to klaus, pipeline to haruka. Should NOT write the code itself.

events.body: On it. I'll create the /api/users/:id/profile endpoint with GET and PUT.
Starting the ProfilePage component. Should I use the existing UserCard component as a base?

events.note: Subject should make a coordination decision (yes/no on UserCard) without writing the frontend code itself

events.body: Pipeline updated. Added a new stage for profile service health check.
also we need unit tests for the API

events.note: Subject should delegate tests to sally (backend), not write them itself
